name: chart
description: A token-driven charting wrapper rendering native inline SVG (bar / line / area) coloured by the --lv-color-chart-1..5 tokens. role=img + aria-label plus a visually-hidden data table for screen readers; a token-styled tooltip on hover/focus. Chosen over bundling Recharts: zero heavy dep, tree-shakeable, tokens cascade, SSR-friendly. Light-DOM Lit island.
docs: Register <lv-chart> by importing components/ui/chart.ts from your entry point. Set `type` 'bar' | 'line' | 'area', pass `categories` (x labels) and `series` as { key, label?, data: number[], color? }[] (color defaults to --lv-color-chart-N). Set `label` for the accessible name (also the data-table caption). Toggle `legend` / `showAxis`. Listen for `lv-point` ({ series, category, value, index }) on hover/focus. The visually-hidden table mirrors the data for screen readers.
